title: trias sicaria
intro: Trias sicaria, also known as Black Henbane, is a poisonous plant native to Europe and Asia, belonging to the nightshade family. Traditionally, it has been used for its medicinal properties, which include antispasmodic and sedative effects, making it useful for treating anxiety, insomnia, and pain relief. The plant's health benefits include reducing inflammation, lowering blood pressure, and acting as an anticonvulsant. Herbal preparations of Trias sicaria often involve drying and processing the leaves or seeds, which can be made into teas, tinctures, or infusions for medicinal use.
